---
title: "Aqaba Case 001"
---

## Overview

This case presents a single-frame gallery-ready export from a D-Claw landslide-tsunami simulation in the Gulf of Aqaba.

The terrain is displayed using a sea-split topo-bathymetric style. The water surface is colored by wave amplitude. The landslide material layer carries `hm`, `m`, and `Δb` fields for interactive switching in the browser viewer.

```{=html}
<div id="aqaba-viewer" class="manta-viewer">
  <div class="manta-viewer-status">Loading MANTA Gallery viewer...</div>
</div>

<script type="module" src="../assets/js/aqaba_case_001_viewer.js"></script>

## Current export settings

| Item | Value |
|---|---:|
| Source | FORT-native |
| Frame index | `20` |
| Terrain / water stride | `20` |
| Landslide stride | `5` |
| Landslide ROI | global union over all `72` frames |
| Landslide ROI pad | `24` cells |
| Water threshold | `m <= 0.3` |
| Landslide threshold | `m >= 0.0` |
| Package size | ~`1.8 MB` |

## Layer styles

| Layer | Style |
|---|---|
| DEM bathymetry | `cmocean.deep` |
| DEM topography | `cmcrameri.grayC + relief` |
| Water surface | `dclaw.tsunami` |
| Landslide | `magma` |
